fullText:
一个用 Chrome Dev Tool 学习调试 Codex App 的技巧：

1. 退出 Codex App，从命令行打开：
> open /Applications/Codex.app --args --remote-debugging-port=8315 --remote-allow-origins=http://localhost:8315

2. Chrome 中输入 chrome://inspect

3. 点击其中的链接即可打开 Chrome Debug Tool https://t.co/xSN48WPzfX

fullText:
Go from raw video to structured data.

Segment the timeline, generate descriptions for each window, and track what happens across a meeting. This is the foundation for querying and retrieving from video at scale.

Learn how to do this in Building Multimodal Data Pipelines: https://t.co/Y7HifTxJNz
